parameters.jsCode:
const leads = ($input.first().json.data || []).filter(l => l.websiteScore && parseInt(l.websiteScore) > 0 && l.leadScore === '0').slice(0, 3).map(l => ({leadId: l.id, businessName: l.businessName, website: l.website, websiteScore: parseInt(l.websiteScore)||0, city: l.city, state: l.state, email: l.email, phone: l.phone}));
return {leads, count: leads.length};

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: [{\"role\":\"system\",\"content\":\"You analyze businesses for digital marketing readiness. Return valid JSON.\"},{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"{{$json.prompt}}\"}]
